## Problem

What problem would this solve?

## Proposal

What should change?

## Scope

- [ ] Native Skill workflow
- [ ] Local retrieval
- [ ] Corpus generation
- [ ] Zotero MCP
- [ ] PaperQA2
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Safety or Data Considerations

Does this affect citations, medical safety, private data, or article redistribution rights?

## 中文补充

可以用中文描述。请说明这个功能解决什么问题、建议怎么做，以及是否涉及引用、医学安全、隐私或文献版权。
